artifact_summary: Screenshot from Hazen SCADA Standards Appendix A showing a level PID loop and level transmitter monitoring interface.
artifact_blurb: A detailed screenshot from the Hazen SCADA Standards Appendix A illustrating a dual-window SCADA interface designed for monitoring a level PID loop and a level transmitter, featuring real-time water level charts, active control status indicators, and precise numerical readouts.
